CREATE FUNCTION my_window_func(int) RETURNS int AS 'SELECT a FROM tbl WHERE a > 10;' LANGUAGE SQL;
CREATE FUNCTION my_window_func(float) RETURNS float AS 'SELECT b FROM tbl WHERE b < 20.5;' LANGUAGE SQL;
CREATE FUNCTION my_window_func(text) RETURNS text AS 'SELECT c FROM tbl WHERE c IS NOT NULL;' LANGUAGE SQL;
CREATE FUNCTION test_schema.my_window_func(int) RETURNS int AS 'SELECT a FROM test_table WHERE a > 10;' LANGUAGE SQL;
CREATE FUNCTION my_window_func(int, float) RETURNS float AS 'SELECT AVG(a) OVER (PARTITION BY b) FROM tbl;' LANGUAGE SQL;
CREATE FUNCTION my_window_func(text, int) RETURNS text AS 'SELECT c FROM tbl WHERE LENGTH(c) > $2;' LANGUAGE SQL;
